sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 21.9 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.21)

statement.latex: Let$F$be a non-abelian free pro-$p$group of finite rank. Can one find a finite collection$U_1, , U_n$of open subgroups of$F$including$F$itself such that the only subgroup of$F$which is contained in$U_i$and is characteristic in$U_i$for every$i$is the trivial subgroup? { Y.\,Barnea}

reiAssessment.solveRationale: Group theory I_INFINITE_SEARCH; Rei not specialized in group theory (yet)
reiAssessment.formalizationNotes: Kourovka problems are typically research-level group theory
